39.reason: This condition is incorrect: it fails when the first non‑zero digit is the last character (e.g., "0.5"), causing the exponent to be off by one. Should always increment k by 1 after counting leading zeros.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  This condition is incorrect: it fails when the first non‑zero digit is the last character (e.g., "0.5"), causing the exponent to be off by one. Should always increment k by 1 after counting leading zeros.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  条件应为 i < len，否则对于 "0.1" 此类输入，k 少加1，导致指数错误
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Logical error: for inputs like "0.5", k remains 0 instead of 1, yielding an incorrect exponent.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [This line assumes i < len, but loop above may run past string end if all digits are zero — undefined behavior, possibly caught by compiler with bounds checking]

6.reason: Macro definition should not end with a semicolon, as it will be literally substituted into the code and cause syntax errors if used in expressions.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  宏定义末尾不应有分号，可能导致编译警告或意外替换
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Macro definition should not end with a semicolon, as it will be literally substituted into the code and cause syntax errors if used in expressions.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Macro definitions should not end with a semicolon, which causes syntax errors when expanded.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The semicolon after macro definition is incorrect and may cause compilation errors when used in expressions. It should be: #define eps 1e-20]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Trailing semicolon in macro definition is incorrect and may cause compilation errors when used in expressions]

24.reason: 对于无小数点的整数，循环条件 i<len-1 导致漏算最后一位，同时应特殊处理整数输出不带小数点

29.reason: Logical error: for single-digit inputs like "5", k becomes -1 instead of 0, yielding an incorrect exponent.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  在无小数点时，k-- 多减1，导致指数偏小1
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Logical error: for single-digit inputs like "5", k becomes -1 instead of 0, yielding an incorrect exponent.

34.reason: [Infinite loop risk: if the input string ends before a non-zero digit is found (e.g., "0.0"), this loop will run past the string bounds, causing undefined behavior or crash. Also, assumes at least two characters exist before the loop starts.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  缺少边界检查 i < len，访问可能越界（如输入"0."或"0.0"时）
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Infinite loop risk: if the input string ends before a non-zero digit is found (e.g., "0.0"), this loop will run past the string bounds, causing undefined behavior or crash. Also, assumes at least two characters exist before the loop starts.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Infinite loop risk if input has no non-zero digit after "0."; also, if input length is <=2, out-of-bounds access occurs — but primary issue is unsafe assumptions leading to undefined behavior, which may cause compile-time rejection in strict modes]

13.reason: 'gets' is deprecated and removed in the C11 standard, which typically causes compilation errors on modern compilers; 'fgets' should be used instead.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  'gets' is deprecated and removed in the C11 standard, which typically causes compilation errors on modern compilers; 'fgets' should be used instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  'gets' is removed in C11 and causes compilation errors in modern compilers; use 'fgets' instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. Using it may cause compilation errors with modern compilers unless specific flags are set. It should be replaced with fgets.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Use of deprecated and unsafe function 'gets'; many modern compilers reject it, causing compilation failure]
